title: WpfHexEditor IDE Workspace
description: Schema for .whidews workspace archive files. A .whidews file is a ZIP archive containing multiple JSON entries that capture the full IDE state (layout, open files, solution, theme).

name.description: Human-readable workspace name shown in the title bar and recent workspaces list.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the workspace was first created.

author.description: Optional author name or machine identity recorded when the workspace was saved.

Manifest.$comment: Stored as manifest.json inside the ZIP archive.

Layout.$comment: Stored as layout.json inside the ZIP archive. Contains the raw docking layout serialized by DockLayoutSerializer.
Layout.description: Opaque docking layout blob produced by DockLayoutSerializer.Serialize(). The exact structure is internal to the Docking module.

SolutionState.$comment: Stored as solution.json inside the ZIP archive.

solutionPath.description: Absolute path to the .sln / .slnx / .slnf solution file that was open when the workspace was saved. Null if no solution was loaded.

path.description: Absolute path to the file that was open in the editor.

editorId.description: ID of the editor that had the file open (e.g. "code-editor", "hex-editor", "text-editor"). Null lets the IDE auto-detect.

cursorLine.description: One-based cursor line at save time. 0 means unknown or not applicable.

cursorCol.description: One-based cursor column at save time. 0 means unknown or not applicable.

OpenFiles.$comment: Stored as openfiles.json inside the ZIP archive.
OpenFiles.description: Ordered list of files that were open in document tabs when the workspace was saved.

SettingsOverride.$comment: Stored as settings.json inside the ZIP archive.
SettingsOverride.description: Workspace-level settings that override user defaults while this workspace is active.

themeName.description: Name of the color theme to activate (stem of the .xaml file, e.g. "Dark" or "Light"). Null means do not override the user theme.

activeBuildConfigName.description: Active build configuration name at save time (e.g. "Debug", "Release"). Null means do not override.

activeBuildPlatform.description: Active build platform at save time (e.g. "AnyCPU", "x64", "x86"). Null means do not override.

PluginStates.$comment: Stored as plugins.json inside the ZIP archive. Present only when at least one plugin saved workspace state.
PluginStates.description: Per-plugin state bags keyed by plugin ID. Each value is an opaque JSON string produced by IWorkspacePersistable.CaptureWorkspaceState().

additionalProperties.description: Raw JSON blob for the plugin identified by this key.
